name: Koishi Komeiji (Yokai Mating Series part 3)
description:
Most people have probably honestly moved on from this site which is one of the reasons I lost motivation so I took a bit of a break and did my own thing for awhile, but Im back continuing this series starting with the best youkai/yokai girl! Warning slight gore and violence warning.

Tags: Koishi, Koishi, Koishi, More Koishi?, Thats a lot of Koishi, Whoa calm down thats too much Koishi, STOP NO MORE KOISHI! 

Reimu and Sekibanki were privated because they are getting overhauled dont worry the old versions will be back Im just working on big things rn!
creator: Touhou Waifu Maker
